title: Yijing Hexagram 32: Heng (Duration)
description: Hexagram 32 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 32 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Duration. Success. No blame. Perseverance furthers. It furthers one to have somewhere to go.
